basics.name: Kairong Luo
basics.summary: Second-year Ph.D. student at Tsinghua University working on scaling of language models, efficient training, open-source pretraining, and pretraining dynamics.

education.area: Ph.D. in Department of Computer Science and Technology
B.S. in Institute for Interdisciplinary Information Sciences (IIIS)

publications.name: How Learning Rate Decay Wastes Your Best Data in Curriculum-Based LLM Pretraining
publications.summary: Studies the mismatch between ascending-quality curricula and standard learning-rate decay in LLM pretraining, and shows that moderate LR decay plus model averaging recovers the gains of curriculum ordering.

publications.name: PCMind-2.1-Kaiyuan-2B Technical Report
publications.summary: Presents a fully open 2B language model and releases the complete stack around it, including model weights, dataset, preprocessing framework, and training framework.

publications.name: A Multi-Power Law for Loss Curve Prediction Across Learning Rate Schedules
publications.summary: Introduces a multi-power law that predicts loss curves across learning-rate schedules and helps identify better schedules than widely used defaults such as cosine decay.

publications.name: DreamFuser: Value-guided Diffusion Policy for Offline Reinforcement Learning
publications.summary: A trajectory-based value optimization approach that combines diffusion policy learning with efficient Q-function learning for offline reinforcement learning.

teaching.course: Introduction to Computing Systems (Chinese, 计算机系统概论)
Data Structure and Algorithm (Chinese, 数据结构与算法)
teaching.description: Course Code: 20740112. Instructor: Wentao Han. Award: Second Prize, Outstanding Teaching Assistant, Tsinghua University.
